                        OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 通过 Hero 设置位置失败: {ex.Message}");
                    }
                }

                // 如果所有方法都失败，记录详细信息并继续（使用回退方案）
                if (!positionSetSuccess)
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning("[OriginSpawnHelper] ⚠️ 所有位置设置方法都失败，将使用回退方案（EnterSettlementAction）");
                    OriginLog.Info("[OriginSpawnHelper] MobileParty 类型信息:");
                    OriginLog.Info($"  - 类型名: {partyType.FullName}");
                    OriginLog.Info($"  - 程序集: {partyType.Assembly.FullName}");
                    
                    // 记录所有字段和属性（用于调试）
                    try
                    {
                        var debugFields = partyType.GetFields(System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                        OriginLog.Info($"  - 字段总数: {debugFields.Length}");
                        foreach (var f in debugFields.Take(20)) // 只记录前20个
                        {
                            OriginLog.Info($"    * {f.Name}: {f.FieldType.Name}");
                        }
                        
                        var debugProps = partyType.GetProperties(System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                        OriginLog.Info($"  - 属性总数: {debugProps.Length}");
                        foreach (var p in debugProps.Take(20)) // 只记录前20个
                        {
                            OriginLog.Info($"    * {p.Name}: {p.PropertyType.Name} ({(p.CanWrite ? "可写" : "只读")})");
                        }
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 记录类型信息失败: {ex.Message}");
                    }
                }

                // 验证位置设置（如果成功）
                Vec2 afterPos = Vec2.Invalid;
                CampaignVec2 afterPosCampaign = CampaignVec2.Invalid;
                if (positionSetSuccess)
                {
                    try
                    {
                        // 尝试获取设置后的位置
                        var tempProp = typeof(MobileParty).GetProperty("Position2D", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                        if (tempProp != null)
                        {
                            var tempVal = tempProp.GetValue(party);
                            if (tempVal is Vec2 v) afterPos = v;
                            else if (tempVal is CampaignVec2 cv) afterPosCampaign = cv;
                        }
                        
                        // 如果属性不存在，尝试字段
                        if (afterPos == Vec2.Invalid && afterPosCampaign == CampaignVec2.Invalid)
                        {
                            foreach (var fieldName in possibleFieldNames)
                            {
                                try
                                {
                                    var field = partyType.GetField(fieldName, System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                                    if (field != null)
                                    {
                                        var tempVal = field.GetValue(party);
                                        if (tempVal is Vec2 v) { afterPos = v; break; }
                                        else if (tempVal is CampaignVec2 cv) { afterPosCampaign = cv; break; }
                                    }
                                }
                                catch { /* ignore */ }
                            }
                        }
                        
                        // 计算距离
                        float distance = float.MaxValue;
                        if (afterPos != Vec2.Invalid)
                        {
                            distance = (afterPos - targetPos).Length;
                            OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 位置设置验证: before=({beforePos.X:F2},{beforePos.Y:F2}) after=({afterPos.X:F2},{afterPos.Y:F2}) target=({targetPos.X:F2},{targetPos.Y:F2}) distance={distance:F2}");
                        }
                        else if (afterPosCampaign != CampaignVec2.Invalid)
                        {
                            var afterVec2 = new Vec2(afterPosCampaign.X, afterPosCampaign.Y);
                            distance = (afterVec2 - targetPos).Length;
                            OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 位置设置验证: before=({beforePosCampaign.X:F2},{beforePosCampaign.Y:F2}) after=({afterPosCampaign.X:F2},{afterPosCampaign.Y:F2}) target=({targetPos.X:F2},{targetPos.Y:F2}) distance={distance:F2}");
                        }
                        
                        if (distance > 1.0f)
                        {
                            OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 位置设置后距离较大 ({distance:F2})，可能设置失败或被重置");
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 位置设置验证成功，距离: {distance:F2}");
                        }
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 验证位置设置失败: {ex.Message}");
                    }
                }

                // 3) 回退方案：把玩家"进入"村子（即使位置设置失败，也要进入村子菜单）
                // 这样玩家至少会进入拉维凯尔的菜单，即使位置没有改变
                bool enterSettlementSuccess = false;
                if (enterSettlementMenu)
                {
                    try
                    {
                        // 如果当前在定居点内，先离开
                        if (party.CurrentSettlement != null)
                        {
                            LeaveSettlementAction.ApplyForParty(party);
                            OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 已离开当前定居点: {party.CurrentSettlement.StringId}");
                        }
                        
                        // 进入目标定居点（回退方案的核心）
                        EnterSettlementAction.ApplyForParty(party, target);
                        enterSettlementSuccess = true;
                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 已进入村子菜单: {target.StringId} (回退方案)");
                        
                        // 可选：防止 AI 在下一帧把队伍拉走
                        try
                        {
                            if (party.Ai != null)
                            {
                                var setMoveModeHoldMethod = typeof(MobileParty).GetMethod("SetMoveModeHold",
                                    System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                                if (setMoveModeHoldMethod != null)
                                {
                                    setMoveModeHoldMethod.Invoke(party, null);
                                    OriginLog.Info("[OriginSpawnHelper] 已设置 AI Hold 模式");
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    // 尝试通过 Ai 属性访问
                                    var aiProperty = typeof(MobileParty).GetProperty("Ai",
                                        System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                                    if (aiProperty != null)
                                    {
                                        var ai = aiProperty.GetValue(party);
                                        if (ai != null)
                                        {
                                            var aiSetMoveModeHoldMethod = ai.GetType().GetMethod("SetMoveModeHold",
                                                System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                                            if (aiSetMoveModeHoldMethod != null)
                                            {
                                                aiSetMoveModeHoldMethod.Invoke(ai, null);
                                                OriginLog.Info("[OriginSpawnHelper] 已通过 Ai 设置 Hold 模式");
                                            }
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        catch (Exception ex)
                        {
                            OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 设置 AI Hold 模式失败（可选功能）: {ex.Message}");
                            // 不返回 false，因为进入定居点已经成功了
                        }
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        OriginLog.Error($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 进入村子菜单失败: {ex.Message}");
                        enterSettlementSuccess = false;
                    }
                }

                // 返回结果：如果位置设置成功或进入定居点成功，都算成功
                if (positionSetSuccess)
                {
                    OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 成功传送玩家到村子: {target.StringId} (位置已设置)");
                    return true;
                }
                else if (enterSettlementSuccess)
                {
                    OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ⚠️ 位置设置失败，但已进入村子菜单: {target.StringId} (回退方案生效)");
                    return true; // 回退方案成功，也算成功
                }
                else
                {
                    OriginLog.Error($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ❌ 位置设置和进入定居点都失败: {target.StringId}");
                    return false;
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                OriginLog.Error($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 异常: {ex.Message}");
                OriginLog.Error($"[OriginSpawnHelper] StackTrace: {ex.StackTrace}");
                return false;
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// 根据方向（direction）查找对应的村子
        /// 用于逃奴出身：根据 "desert"、"empire" 等方向查找合适的村子
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="direction">方向（"desert"、"empire"、"steppe"）</param>
        /// <returns>村子的 StringId，如果找不到则返回 null</returns>
        public static string FindVillageByDirection(string direction)
        {
            try
            {
                if (Campaign.Current == null)
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning("[OriginSpawnHelper] Campaign.Current is null");
                    return null;
                }

                string culture = null;
                if (direction == "desert")
                    culture = "aserai";
                else if (direction == "steppe")
                    culture = "khuzait";
                else if (direction == "empire")
                    culture = "empire";

                if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(culture))
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 未知方向: {direction}");
                    return null;
                }

                // 查找该文化的第一个村子
                var village = Campaign.Current.Settlements
                    .FirstOrDefault(s => s != null && s.IsVillage && s.Culture != null && s.Culture.StringId == culture);

                if (village != null)
                {
                    OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 根据方向 {direction} 找到村子: {village.StringId} ({village.Name})");
                    return village.StringId;
                }

                OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 根据方向 {direction} 找不到村子");
                return null;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                OriginLog.Error($"[OriginSpawnHelper] FindVillageByDirection 异常: {ex.Message}");
                return null;
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// 根据文化ID查找对应的村子
        /// 用于侠义骑士出身：根据 "nord"、"aserai" 等文化查找村子
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="cultureId">文化ID（"nord"、"aserai"、"battania"、"vlandia"）</param>
        /// <returns>村子的 StringId，如果找不到则返回 null</returns>
        public static string FindVillageByCulture(string cultureId)
        {
            try
            {
                if (Campaign.Current == null)
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning("[OriginSpawnHelper] Campaign.Current is null");
                    return null;
                }

                // 特殊处理：诺德文化（sturgia）- 尝试查找拉维凯尔
                if (cultureId == "sturgia" || cultureId == "nord")
                {
                    var ravikail = Campaign.Current.Settlements.FirstOrDefault(s =>
                        s != null && s.IsVillage &&
                        (s.Name.ToString().Contains("拉维凯尔") ||
                         s.Name.ToString().Contains("Ravikail") ||
                         s.StringId.Contains("ravikail") ||
                         s.StringId.Contains("Ravikail")));

                    if (ravikail != null)
                    {
                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 找到拉维凯尔: {ravikail.StringId}");
                        return ravikail.StringId;
                    }

                    // 回退到 Sturgia 文化的第一个村子
                    cultureId = "sturgia";
                }

                // 查找该文化的第一个村子
                var village = Campaign.Current.Settlements
                    .FirstOrDefault(s => s != null && s.IsVillage && s.Culture != null && s.Culture.StringId == cultureId);

                if (village != null)
                {
                    OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 根据文化 {cultureId} 找到村子: {village.StringId} ({village.Name})");
                    return village.StringId;
                }

                OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 根据文化 {cultureId} 找不到村子");
                return null;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                OriginLog.Error($"[OriginSpawnHelper] FindVillageByCulture 异常: {ex.Message}");
                return null;
            }
        }
    }
}

```

```csharp
using System;
using System.Linq;
using TaleWorlds.CampaignSystem;
using TaleWorlds.CampaignSystem.Actions;
using TaleWorlds.CampaignSystem.Party;
using TaleWorlds.CampaignSystem.Settlements;
using TaleWorlds.Library;

namespace OriginSystemMod
{
    /// <summary>
    /// 出身系统出生点传送辅助类
    /// 按照 ChatGPT 建议的标准模板实现
    /// </summary>
    public static class OriginSpawnHelper
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// 传送玩家到指定村子
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="villageId">村子的 StringId（如 "village_steppe_1"）</param>
        /// <param name="enterSettlementMenu">是否进入村子菜单（true = 直接进入村子界面）</param>
        /// <returns>是否成功</returns>
        public static bool SpawnPlayerAtVillage(string villageId, bool enterSettlementMenu = true)
        {
            try
            {
                if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(villageId))
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning("[OriginSpawnHelper] villageId is null/empty");
                    return false;
                }

                if (Campaign.Current == null)
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning("[OriginSpawnHelper] Campaign.Current is null");
                    return false;
                }

                // 1) 找到目标村子 Settlement
                Settlement target = Settlement.Find(villageId);
                if (target == null)
                {
                    // 兼容：有时 Find 不可用/拿不到，就遍历
                    target = Settlement.All.FirstOrDefault(s => s != null && s.StringId == villageId);
                }
                
                if (target == null)
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 找不到村子: {villageId}");
                    return false;
                }

                OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 找到目标村子: {target.StringId} ({target.Name})");

                var party = MobileParty.MainParty;
                if (party == null)
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning("[OriginSpawnHelper] MobileParty.MainParty is null");
                    return false;
                }

                // 2) 传送主队伍到村子附近
                // 注意：MobileParty.Position2D 是 Vec2 类型（需要通过反射访问）
                // Settlement.GatePosition 是 CampaignVec2，需要转换为 Vec2
                Vec2 targetPos;
                try
                {
                    // 优先使用 GatePosition（CampaignVec2），转换为 Vec2
                    var gatePos = target.GatePosition;
                    if (gatePos != CampaignVec2.Invalid)
                    {
                        targetPos = new Vec2(gatePos.X, gatePos.Y);
                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 使用 GatePosition 转换为 Vec2: ({targetPos.X:F2}, {targetPos.Y:F2})");
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        // 回退到 Position（CampaignVec2），转换为 Vec2
                        var settlementPos = target.Position;
                        targetPos = new Vec2(settlementPos.X, settlementPos.Y);
                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 使用 Position 转换为 Vec2: ({targetPos.X:F2}, {targetPos.Y:F2})");
                    }
                }
                catch (Exception ex)
                {
                    // 如果所有方法都失败，使用 Position 转换
                    var settlementPos = target.Position;
                    targetPos = new Vec2(settlementPos.X, settlementPos.Y);
                    OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 回退到 Position 转换: ({targetPos.X:F2}, {targetPos.Y:F2}), 原因: {ex.Message}");
                }

                // 添加小随机偏移，避免多个队伍在同一位置重叠
                var rnd = new Random();
                var offset = new Vec2(
                    (float)(rnd.NextDouble() * 2.0 - 1.0) * 0.5f,
                    (float)(rnd.NextDouble() * 2.0 - 1.0) * 0.5f
                );
                targetPos += offset;

                // 获取设置前的位置（用于验证）
                Vec2 beforePos = Vec2.Invalid;
                CampaignVec2 beforePosCampaign = CampaignVec2.Invalid;
                try
                {
                    // 尝试通过可能的属性/字段获取当前位置
                    var tempProp = typeof(MobileParty).GetProperty("Position2D", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                    if (tempProp != null)
                    {
                        var tempVal = tempProp.GetValue(party);
                        if (tempVal is Vec2 v) beforePos = v;
                        else if (tempVal is CampaignVec2 cv) beforePosCampaign = cv;
                    }
                }
                catch { /* ignore */ }

                // 设置队伍位置：使用全面的反射搜索策略
                bool positionSetSuccess = false;
                var partyType = typeof(MobileParty);
                var vec2Type = typeof(Vec2);
                var campaignVec2Type = typeof(CampaignVec2);

                OriginLog.Info("[OriginSpawnHelper] 开始全面的反射搜索，查找位置相关的字段/属性...");

                // 方法1：尝试所有可能的字段名
                string[] possibleFieldNames = { "_position2D", "_position", "position2D", "position", "Position2D", "Position" };
                foreach (var fieldName in possibleFieldNames)
                {
                    try
                    {
                        var field = partyType.GetField(fieldName, System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                        if (field != null)
                        {
                            OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 找到字段: {fieldName}, 类型: {field.FieldType.FullName}");
                            
                            // 尝试设置 Vec2
                            if (field.FieldType == vec2Type)
                            {
                                field.SetValue(party, targetPos);
                                OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 已通过字段 {fieldName} (Vec2) 设置位置");
                                positionSetSuccess = true;
                                break;
                            }
                            // 尝试设置 CampaignVec2
                            else if (field.FieldType == campaignVec2Type)
                            {
                                // 尝试使用反射创建 CampaignVec2，因为构造函数签名可能不同
                                object campaignPos = null;
                                try
                                {
                                    // 方法1：尝试 (float, float) 构造函数
                                    var ctor = campaignVec2Type.GetConstructor(new Type[] { typeof(float), typeof(float) });
                                    if (ctor != null)
                                    {
                                        campaignPos = ctor.Invoke(new object[] { targetPos.X, targetPos.Y });
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        // 方法2：尝试从 Vec2 转换
                                        var ctorVec2 = campaignVec2Type.GetConstructor(new Type[] { typeof(Vec2) });
                                        if (ctorVec2 != null)
                                        {
                                            campaignPos = ctorVec2.Invoke(new object[] { targetPos });
                                        }
                                    }
                                    
                                    if (campaignPos != null)
                                    {
                                        field.SetValue(party, campaignPos);
                                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 已通过字段 {fieldName} (CampaignVec2) 设置位置");
                                        positionSetSuccess = true;
                                        break;
                                    }
                                }
                                catch (Exception ex)
                                {
                                    OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 创建 CampaignVec2 失败: {ex.Message}");
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 尝试字段 {fieldName} 失败: {ex.Message}");
                    }
                }

                // 方法2：遍历所有字段，查找 Vec2 或 CampaignVec2 类型
                if (!positionSetSuccess)
                {
                    try
                    {
                        var allFields = partyType.GetFields(System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 找到 {allFields.Length} 个字段，开始遍历查找位置相关字段...");
                        
                        foreach (var field in allFields)
                        {
                            if (field.FieldType == vec2Type || field.FieldType == campaignVec2Type)
                            {
                                OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 候选字段: {field.Name}, 类型: {field.FieldType.FullName}, 可写: {!field.IsInitOnly}");
                                
                                if (!field.IsInitOnly)
                                {
                                    try
                                    {
                                        if (field.FieldType == vec2Type)
                                        {
                                            field.SetValue(party, targetPos);
                                            OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 已通过字段 {field.Name} (Vec2) 设置位置");
                                            positionSetSuccess = true;
                                            break;
                                        }
                                        else if (field.FieldType == campaignVec2Type)
                                        {
                                            // 尝试使用反射创建 CampaignVec2
                                            object campaignPos = null;
                                            try
                                            {
                                                var ctor = campaignVec2Type.GetConstructor(new Type[] { typeof(float), typeof(float) });
                                                if (ctor != null)
                                                {
                                                    campaignPos = ctor.Invoke(new object[] { targetPos.X, targetPos.Y });
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    var ctorVec2 = campaignVec2Type.GetConstructor(new Type[] { typeof(Vec2) });
                                                    if (ctorVec2 != null)
                                                    {
                                                        campaignPos = ctorVec2.Invoke(new object[] { targetPos });
                                                    }
                                                }
                                                
                                                if (campaignPos != null)
                                                {
                                                    field.SetValue(party, campaignPos);
                                                    OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 已通过字段 {field.Name} (CampaignVec2) 设置位置");
                                                    positionSetSuccess = true;
                                                    break;
                                                }
                                            }
                                            catch (Exception ex)
                                            {
                                                OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 创建 CampaignVec2 失败: {ex.Message}");
                                            }
                                        }
                                    }
                                    catch (Exception ex)
                                    {
                                        OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 设置字段 {field.Name} 失败: {ex.Message}");
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 遍历字段失败: {ex.Message}");
                    }
                }

                // 方法3：遍历所有属性，查找 Vec2 或 CampaignVec2 类型
                if (!positionSetSuccess)
                {
                    try
                    {
                        var allProperties = partyType.GetProperties(System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 找到 {allProperties.Length} 个属性，开始遍历查找位置相关属性...");
                        
                        foreach (var prop in allProperties)
                        {
                            if ((prop.PropertyType == vec2Type || prop.PropertyType == campaignVec2Type) && prop.CanWrite)
                            {
                                OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 候选属性: {prop.Name}, 类型: {prop.PropertyType.FullName}, 可写: {prop.CanWrite}");
                                
                                try
                                {
                                    if (prop.PropertyType == vec2Type)
                                    {
                                        prop.SetValue(party, targetPos);
                                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 已通过属性 {prop.Name} (Vec2) 设置位置");
                                        positionSetSuccess = true;
                                        break;
                                    }
                                    else if (prop.PropertyType == campaignVec2Type)
                                    {
                                        // 尝试使用反射创建 CampaignVec2
                                        object campaignPos = null;
                                        try
                                        {
                                            var ctor = campaignVec2Type.GetConstructor(new Type[] { typeof(float), typeof(float) });
                                            if (ctor != null)
                                            {
                                                campaignPos = ctor.Invoke(new object[] { targetPos.X, targetPos.Y });
                                            }
                                            else
                                            {
                                                var ctorVec2 = campaignVec2Type.GetConstructor(new Type[] { typeof(Vec2) });
                                                if (ctorVec2 != null)
                                                {
                                                    campaignPos = ctorVec2.Invoke(new object[] { targetPos });
                                                }
                                            }
                                            
                                            if (campaignPos != null)
                                            {
                                                prop.SetValue(party, campaignPos);
                                                OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 已通过属性 {prop.Name} (CampaignVec2) 设置位置");
                                                positionSetSuccess = true;
                                                break;
                                            }
                                        }
                                        catch (Exception ex)
                                        {
                                            OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 创建 CampaignVec2 失败: {ex.Message}");
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                                catch (Exception ex)
                                {
                                    OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 设置属性 {prop.Name} 失败: {ex.Message}");
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 遍历属性失败: {ex.Message}");
                    }
                }

                // 方法4：尝试通过 Hero 位置间接设置
                if (!positionSetSuccess)
                {
                    try
                    {
                        var leaderProp = partyType.GetProperty("Leader", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                        if (leaderProp != null)
                        {
                            var leader = leaderProp.GetValue(party);
                            if (leader != null)
                            {
                                var heroType = leader.GetType();
                                var heroPosProp = heroType.GetProperty("Position2D", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                                if (heroPosProp != null && heroPosProp.CanWrite)
                                {
                                    if (heroPosProp.PropertyType == vec2Type)
                                    {
                                        heroPosProp.SetValue(leader, targetPos);
                                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 已通过 Hero.Position2D (Vec2) 设置位置");
                                        positionSetSuccess = true;
                                    }
                                    else if (heroPosProp.PropertyType == campaignVec2Type)
                                    {
                                        var campaignPos = new CampaignVec2(targetPos.X, targetPos.Y);
                                        heroPosProp.SetValue(leader, campaignPos);
                                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 已通过 Hero.Position2D (CampaignVec2) 设置位置");
                                        positionSetSuccess = true;
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 通过 Hero 设置位置失败: {ex.Message}");
                    }
                }

                // 如果所有方法都失败，记录详细信息并继续（使用回退方案）
                if (!positionSetSuccess)
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning("[OriginSpawnHelper] ⚠️ 所有位置设置方法都失败，将使用回退方案（EnterSettlementAction）");
                    OriginLog.Info("[OriginSpawnHelper] MobileParty 类型信息:");
                    OriginLog.Info($"  - 类型名: {partyType.FullName}");
                    OriginLog.Info($"  - 程序集: {partyType.Assembly.FullName}");
                    
                    // 记录所有字段和属性（用于调试）
                    try
                    {
                        var debugFields = partyType.GetFields(System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                        OriginLog.Info($"  - 字段总数: {debugFields.Length}");
                        foreach (var f in debugFields.Take(20)) // 只记录前20个
                        {
                            OriginLog.Info($"    * {f.Name}: {f.FieldType.Name}");
                        }
                        
                        var debugProps = partyType.GetProperties(System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                        OriginLog.Info($"  - 属性总数: {debugProps.Length}");
                        foreach (var p in debugProps.Take(20)) // 只记录前20个
                        {
                            OriginLog.Info($"    * {p.Name}: {p.PropertyType.Name} ({(p.CanWrite ? "可写" : "只读")})");
                        }
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 记录类型信息失败: {ex.Message}");
                    }
                }

                // 验证位置设置（如果成功）
                Vec2 afterPos = Vec2.Invalid;
                CampaignVec2 afterPosCampaign = CampaignVec2.Invalid;
                if (positionSetSuccess)
                {
                    try
                    {
                        // 尝试获取设置后的位置
                        var tempProp = typeof(MobileParty).GetProperty("Position2D", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                        if (tempProp != null)
                        {
                            var tempVal = tempProp.GetValue(party);
                            if (tempVal is Vec2 v) afterPos = v;
                            else if (tempVal is CampaignVec2 cv) afterPosCampaign = cv;
                        }
                        
                        // 如果属性不存在，尝试字段
                        if (afterPos == Vec2.Invalid && afterPosCampaign == CampaignVec2.Invalid)
                        {
                            foreach (var fieldName in possibleFieldNames)
                            {
                                try
                                {
                                    var field = partyType.GetField(fieldName, System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                                    if (field != null)
                                    {
                                        var tempVal = field.GetValue(party);
                                        if (tempVal is Vec2 v) { afterPos = v; break; }
                                        else if (tempVal is CampaignVec2 cv) { afterPosCampaign = cv; break; }
                                    }
                                }
                                catch { /* ignore */ }
                            }
                        }
                        
                        // 计算距离
                        float distance = float.MaxValue;
                        if (afterPos != Vec2.Invalid)
                        {
                            distance = (afterPos - targetPos).Length;
                            OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 位置设置验证: before=({beforePos.X:F2},{beforePos.Y:F2}) after=({afterPos.X:F2},{afterPos.Y:F2}) target=({targetPos.X:F2},{targetPos.Y:F2}) distance={distance:F2}");
                        }
                        else if (afterPosCampaign != CampaignVec2.Invalid)
                        {
                            var afterVec2 = new Vec2(afterPosCampaign.X, afterPosCampaign.Y);
                            distance = (afterVec2 - targetPos).Length;
                            OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 位置设置验证: before=({beforePosCampaign.X:F2},{beforePosCampaign.Y:F2}) after=({afterPosCampaign.X:F2},{afterPosCampaign.Y:F2}) target=({targetPos.X:F2},{targetPos.Y:F2}) distance={distance:F2}");
                        }
                        
                        if (distance > 1.0f)
                        {
                            OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 位置设置后距离较大 ({distance:F2})，可能设置失败或被重置");
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 位置设置验证成功，距离: {distance:F2}");
                        }
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 验证位置设置失败: {ex.Message}");
                    }
                }

                // 3) 回退方案：把玩家"进入"村子（即使位置设置失败，也要进入村子菜单）
                // 这样玩家至少会进入拉维凯尔的菜单，即使位置没有改变
                bool enterSettlementSuccess = false;
                if (enterSettlementMenu)
                {
                    try
                    {
                        // 如果当前在定居点内，先离开
                        if (party.CurrentSettlement != null)
                        {
                            LeaveSettlementAction.ApplyForParty(party);
                            OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 已离开当前定居点: {party.CurrentSettlement.StringId}");
                        }
                        
                        // 进入目标定居点（回退方案的核心）
                        EnterSettlementAction.ApplyForParty(party, target);
                        enterSettlementSuccess = true;
                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 已进入村子菜单: {target.StringId} (回退方案)");
                        
                        // 可选：防止 AI 在下一帧把队伍拉走
                        try
                        {
                            if (party.Ai != null)
                            {
                                var setMoveModeHoldMethod = typeof(MobileParty).GetMethod("SetMoveModeHold",
                                    System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                                if (setMoveModeHoldMethod != null)
                                {
                                    setMoveModeHoldMethod.Invoke(party, null);
                                    OriginLog.Info("[OriginSpawnHelper] 已设置 AI Hold 模式");
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    // 尝试通过 Ai 属性访问
                                    var aiProperty = typeof(MobileParty).GetProperty("Ai",
                                        System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                                    if (aiProperty != null)
                                    {
                                        var ai = aiProperty.GetValue(party);
                                        if (ai != null)
                                        {
                                            var aiSetMoveModeHoldMethod = ai.GetType().GetMethod("SetMoveModeHold",
                                                System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                                            if (aiSetMoveModeHoldMethod != null)
                                            {
                                                aiSetMoveModeHoldMethod.Invoke(ai, null);
                                                OriginLog.Info("[OriginSpawnHelper] 已通过 Ai 设置 Hold 模式");
                                            }
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        catch (Exception ex)
                        {
                            OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 设置 AI Hold 模式失败（可选功能）: {ex.Message}");
                            // 不返回 false，因为进入定居点已经成功了
                        }
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        OriginLog.Error($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 进入村子菜单失败: {ex.Message}");
                        enterSettlementSuccess = false;
                    }
                }

                // 返回结果：如果位置设置成功或进入定居点成功，都算成功
                if (positionSetSuccess)
                {
                    OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 成功传送玩家到村子: {target.StringId} (位置已设置)");
                    return true;
                }
                else if (enterSettlementSuccess)
                {
                    OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ⚠️ 位置设置失败，但已进入村子菜单: {target.StringId} (回退方案生效)");
                    return true; // 回退方案成功，也算成功
                }
                else
                {
                    OriginLog.Error($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ❌ 位置设置和进入定居点都失败: {target.StringId}");
                    return false;
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                OriginLog.Error($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 异常: {ex.Message}");
                OriginLog.Error($"[OriginSpawnHelper] StackTrace: {ex.StackTrace}");
                return false;
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// 根据方向（direction）查找对应的村子
        /// 用于逃奴出身：根据 "desert"、"empire" 等方向查找合适的村子
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="direction">方向（"desert"、"empire"、"steppe"）</param>
        /// <returns>村子的 StringId，如果找不到则返回 null</returns>
        public static string FindVillageByDirection(string direction)
        {
            try
            {
                if (Campaign.Current == null)
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning("[OriginSpawnHelper] Campaign.Current is null");
                    return null;
                }

                string culture = null;
                if (direction == "desert")
                    culture = "aserai";
                else if (direction == "steppe")
                    culture = "khuzait";
                else if (direction == "empire")
                    culture = "empire";

                if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(culture))
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 未知方向: {direction}");
                    return null;
                }

                // 查找该文化的第一个村子
                var village = Campaign.Current.Settlements
                    .FirstOrDefault(s => s != null && s.IsVillage && s.Culture != null && s.Culture.StringId == culture);

                if (village != null)
                {
                    OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 根据方向 {direction} 找到村子: {village.StringId} ({village.Name})");
                    return village.StringId;
                }

                OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 根据方向 {direction} 找不到村子");
                return null;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                OriginLog.Error($"[OriginSpawnHelper] FindVillageByDirection 异常: {ex.Message}");
                return null;
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// 根据文化ID查找对应的村子
        /// 用于侠义骑士出身：根据 "nord"、"aserai" 等文化查找村子
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="cultureId">文化ID（"nord"、"aserai"、"battania"、"vlandia"）</param>
        /// <returns>村子的 StringId，如果找不到则返回 null</returns>
        public static string FindVillageByCulture(string cultureId)
        {
            try
            {
                if (Campaign.Current == null)
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning("[OriginSpawnHelper] Campaign.Current is null");
                    return null;
                }

                // 特殊处理：诺德文化（sturgia）- 尝试查找拉维凯尔
                if (cultureId == "sturgia" || cultureId == "nord")
                {
                    var ravikail = Campaign.Current.Settlements.FirstOrDefault(s =>
                        s != null && s.IsVillage &&
                        (s.Name.ToString().Contains("拉维凯尔") ||
                         s.Name.ToString().Contains("Ravikail") ||
                         s.StringId.Contains("ravikail") ||
                         s.StringId.Contains("Ravikail")));

                    if (ravikail != null)
                    {
                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 找到拉维凯尔: {ravikail.StringId}");
                        return ravikail.StringId;
                    }

                    // 回退到 Sturgia 文化的第一个村子
                    cultureId = "sturgia";
                }

                // 查找该文化的第一个村子
                var village = Campaign.Current.Settlements
                    .FirstOrDefault(s => s != null && s.IsVillage && s.Culture != null && s.Culture.StringId == cultureId);

                if (village != null)
                {
                    OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 根据文化 {cultureId} 找到村子: {village.StringId} ({village.Name})");
                    return village.StringId;
                }

                OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 根据文化 {cultureId} 找不到村子");
                return null;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                OriginLog.Error($"[OriginSpawnHelper] FindVillageByCulture 异常: {ex.Message}");
                return null;
            }
        }
    }
}

```

```csharp
using System;
using System.Linq;
using TaleWorlds.CampaignSystem;
using TaleWorlds.CampaignSystem.Actions;
using TaleWorlds.CampaignSystem.Party;
using TaleWorlds.CampaignSystem.Settlements;
using TaleWorlds.Library;

namespace OriginSystemMod
{
    /// <summary>
    /// 出身系统出生点传送辅助类
    /// 按照 ChatGPT 建议的标准模板实现
    /// </summary>
    public static class OriginSpawnHelper
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// 传送玩家到指定村子
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="villageId">村子的 StringId（如 "village_steppe_1"）</param>
        /// <param name="enterSettlementMenu">是否进入村子菜单（true = 直接进入村子界面）</param>
        /// <returns>是否成功</returns>
        public static bool SpawnPlayerAtVillage(string villageId, bool enterSettlementMenu = true)
        {
            try
            {
                if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(villageId))
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning("[OriginSpawnHelper] villageId is null/empty");
                    return false;
                }

                if (Campaign.Current == null)
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning("[OriginSpawnHelper] Campaign.Current is null");
                    return false;
                }

                // 1) 找到目标村子 Settlement
                Settlement target = Settlement.Find(villageId);
                if (target == null)
                {
                    // 兼容：有时 Find 不可用/拿不到，就遍历
                    target = Settlement.All.FirstOrDefault(s => s != null && s.StringId == villageId);
                }
                
                if (target == null)
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 找不到村子: {villageId}");
                    return false;
                }

                OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 找到目标村子: {target.StringId} ({target.Name})");

                var party = MobileParty.MainParty;
                if (party == null)
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning("[OriginSpawnHelper] MobileParty.MainParty is null");
                    return false;
                }

                // 2) 传送主队伍到村子附近
                // 注意：MobileParty.Position2D 是 Vec2 类型（需要通过反射访问）
                // Settlement.GatePosition 是 CampaignVec2，需要转换为 Vec2
                Vec2 targetPos;
                try
                {
                    // 优先使用 GatePosition（CampaignVec2），转换为 Vec2
                    var gatePos = target.GatePosition;
                    if (gatePos != CampaignVec2.Invalid)
                    {
                        targetPos = new Vec2(gatePos.X, gatePos.Y);
                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 使用 GatePosition 转换为 Vec2: ({targetPos.X:F2}, {targetPos.Y:F2})");
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        // 回退到 Position（CampaignVec2），转换为 Vec2
                        var settlementPos = target.Position;
                        targetPos = new Vec2(settlementPos.X, settlementPos.Y);
                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 使用 Position 转换为 Vec2: ({targetPos.X:F2}, {targetPos.Y:F2})");
                    }
                }
                catch (Exception ex)
                {
                    // 如果所有方法都失败，使用 Position 转换
                    var settlementPos = target.Position;
                    targetPos = new Vec2(settlementPos.X, settlementPos.Y);
                    OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 回退到 Position 转换: ({targetPos.X:F2}, {targetPos.Y:F2}), 原因: {ex.Message}");
                }

                // 添加小随机偏移，避免多个队伍在同一位置重叠
                var rnd = new Random();
                var offset = new Vec2(
                    (float)(rnd.NextDouble() * 2.0 - 1.0) * 0.5f,
                    (float)(rnd.NextDouble() * 2.0 - 1.0) * 0.5f
                );
                targetPos += offset;

                // 获取设置前的位置（用于验证）
                Vec2 beforePos = Vec2.Invalid;
                CampaignVec2 beforePosCampaign = CampaignVec2.Invalid;
                try
                {
                    // 尝试通过可能的属性/字段获取当前位置
                    var tempProp = typeof(MobileParty).GetProperty("Position2D", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                    if (tempProp != null)
                    {
                        var tempVal = tempProp.GetValue(party);
                        if (tempVal is Vec2 v) beforePos = v;
                        else if (tempVal is CampaignVec2 cv) beforePosCampaign = cv;
                    }
                }
                catch { /* ignore */ }

                // 设置队伍位置：使用全面的反射搜索策略
                bool positionSetSuccess = false;
                var partyType = typeof(MobileParty);
                var vec2Type = typeof(Vec2);
                var campaignVec2Type = typeof(CampaignVec2);

                OriginLog.Info("[OriginSpawnHelper] 开始全面的反射搜索，查找位置相关的字段/属性...");

                // 方法1：尝试所有可能的字段名
                string[] possibleFieldNames = { "_position2D", "_position", "position2D", "position", "Position2D", "Position" };
                foreach (var fieldName in possibleFieldNames)
                {
                    try
                    {
                        var field = partyType.GetField(fieldName, System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                        if (field != null)
                        {
                            OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 找到字段: {fieldName}, 类型: {field.FieldType.FullName}");
                            
                            // 尝试设置 Vec2
                            if (field.FieldType == vec2Type)
                            {
                                field.SetValue(party, targetPos);
                                OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 已通过字段 {fieldName} (Vec2) 设置位置");
                                positionSetSuccess = true;
                                break;
                            }
                            // 尝试设置 CampaignVec2
                            else if (field.FieldType == campaignVec2Type)
                            {
                                // 尝试使用反射创建 CampaignVec2，因为构造函数签名可能不同
                                object campaignPos = null;
                                try
                                {
                                    // 方法1：尝试 (float, float) 构造函数
                                    var ctor = campaignVec2Type.GetConstructor(new Type[] { typeof(float), typeof(float) });
                                    if (ctor != null)
                                    {
                                        campaignPos = ctor.Invoke(new object[] { targetPos.X, targetPos.Y });
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        // 方法2：尝试从 Vec2 转换
                                        var ctorVec2 = campaignVec2Type.GetConstructor(new Type[] { typeof(Vec2) });
                                        if (ctorVec2 != null)
                                        {
                                            campaignPos = ctorVec2.Invoke(new object[] { targetPos });
                                        }
                                    }
                                    
                                    if (campaignPos != null)
                                    {
                                        field.SetValue(party, campaignPos);
                                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 已通过字段 {fieldName} (CampaignVec2) 设置位置");
                                        positionSetSuccess = true;
                                        break;
                                    }
                                }
                                catch (Exception ex)
                                {
                                    OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 创建 CampaignVec2 失败: {ex.Message}");
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 尝试字段 {fieldName} 失败: {ex.Message}");
                    }
                }

                // 方法2：遍历所有字段，查找 Vec2 或 CampaignVec2 类型
                if (!positionSetSuccess)
                {
                    try
                    {
                        var allFields = partyType.GetFields(System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 找到 {allFields.Length} 个字段，开始遍历查找位置相关字段...");
                        
                        foreach (var field in allFields)
                        {
                            if (field.FieldType == vec2Type || field.FieldType == campaignVec2Type)
                            {
                                OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 候选字段: {field.Name}, 类型: {field.FieldType.FullName}, 可写: {!field.IsInitOnly}");
                                
                                if (!field.IsInitOnly)
                                {
                                    try
                                    {
                                        if (field.FieldType == vec2Type)
                                        {
                                            field.SetValue(party, targetPos);
                                            OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 已通过字段 {field.Name} (Vec2) 设置位置");
                                            positionSetSuccess = true;
                                            break;
                                        }
                                        else if (field.FieldType == campaignVec2Type)
                                        {
                                            // 尝试使用反射创建 CampaignVec2
                                            object campaignPos = null;
                                            try
                                            {
                                                var ctor = campaignVec2Type.GetConstructor(new Type[] { typeof(float), typeof(float) });
                                                if (ctor != null)
                                                {
                                                    campaignPos = ctor.Invoke(new object[] { targetPos.X, targetPos.Y });
                                                }
                                                else
                                                {
                                                    var ctorVec2 = campaignVec2Type.GetConstructor(new Type[] { typeof(Vec2) });
                                                    if (ctorVec2 != null)
                                                    {
                                                        campaignPos = ctorVec2.Invoke(new object[] { targetPos });
                                                    }
                                                }
                                                
                                                if (campaignPos != null)
                                                {
                                                    field.SetValue(party, campaignPos);
                                                    OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 已通过字段 {field.Name} (CampaignVec2) 设置位置");
                                                    positionSetSuccess = true;
                                                    break;
                                                }
                                            }
                                            catch (Exception ex)
                                            {
                                                OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 创建 CampaignVec2 失败: {ex.Message}");
                                            }
                                        }
                                    }
                                    catch (Exception ex)
                                    {
                                        OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 设置字段 {field.Name} 失败: {ex.Message}");
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 遍历字段失败: {ex.Message}");
                    }
                }

                // 方法3：遍历所有属性，查找 Vec2 或 CampaignVec2 类型
                if (!positionSetSuccess)
                {
                    try
                    {
                        var allProperties = partyType.GetProperties(System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 找到 {allProperties.Length} 个属性，开始遍历查找位置相关属性...");
                        
                        foreach (var prop in allProperties)
                        {
                            if ((prop.PropertyType == vec2Type || prop.PropertyType == campaignVec2Type) && prop.CanWrite)
                            {
                                OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 候选属性: {prop.Name}, 类型: {prop.PropertyType.FullName}, 可写: {prop.CanWrite}");
                                
                                try
                                {
                                    if (prop.PropertyType == vec2Type)
                                    {
                                        prop.SetValue(party, targetPos);
                                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 已通过属性 {prop.Name} (Vec2) 设置位置");
                                        positionSetSuccess = true;
                                        break;
                                    }
                                    else if (prop.PropertyType == campaignVec2Type)
                                    {
                                        // 尝试使用反射创建 CampaignVec2
                                        object campaignPos = null;
                                        try
                                        {
                                            var ctor = campaignVec2Type.GetConstructor(new Type[] { typeof(float), typeof(float) });
                                            if (ctor != null)
                                            {
                                                campaignPos = ctor.Invoke(new object[] { targetPos.X, targetPos.Y });
                                            }
                                            else
                                            {
                                                var ctorVec2 = campaignVec2Type.GetConstructor(new Type[] { typeof(Vec2) });
                                                if (ctorVec2 != null)
                                                {
                                                    campaignPos = ctorVec2.Invoke(new object[] { targetPos });
                                                }
                                            }
                                            
                                            if (campaignPos != null)
                                            {
                                                prop.SetValue(party, campaignPos);
                                                OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 已通过属性 {prop.Name} (CampaignVec2) 设置位置");
                                                positionSetSuccess = true;
                                                break;
                                            }
                                        }
                                        catch (Exception ex)
                                        {
                                            OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 创建 CampaignVec2 失败: {ex.Message}");
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                                catch (Exception ex)
                                {
                                    OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 设置属性 {prop.Name} 失败: {ex.Message}");
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 遍历属性失败: {ex.Message}");
                    }
                }

                // 方法4：尝试通过 Hero 位置间接设置
                if (!positionSetSuccess)
                {
                    try
                    {
                        var leaderProp = partyType.GetProperty("Leader", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                        if (leaderProp != null)
                        {
                            var leader = leaderProp.GetValue(party);
                            if (leader != null)
                            {
                                var heroType = leader.GetType();
                                var heroPosProp = heroType.GetProperty("Position2D", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                                if (heroPosProp != null && heroPosProp.CanWrite)
                                {
                                    if (heroPosProp.PropertyType == vec2Type)
                                    {
                                        heroPosProp.SetValue(leader, targetPos);
                                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 已通过 Hero.Position2D (Vec2) 设置位置");
                                        positionSetSuccess = true;
                                    }
                                    else if (heroPosProp.PropertyType == campaignVec2Type)
                                    {
                                        // 尝试使用反射创建 CampaignVec2
                                        object campaignPos = null;
                                        try
                                        {
                                            var ctor = campaignVec2Type.GetConstructor(new Type[] { typeof(float), typeof(float) });
                                            if (ctor != null)
                                            {
                                                campaignPos = ctor.Invoke(new object[] { targetPos.X, targetPos.Y });
                                            }
                                            else
                                            {
                                                var ctorVec2 = campaignVec2Type.GetConstructor(new Type[] { typeof(Vec2) });
                                                if (ctorVec2 != null)
                                                {
                                                    campaignPos = ctorVec2.Invoke(new object[] { targetPos });
                                                }
                                            }
                                            
                                            if (campaignPos != null)
                                            {
                                                heroPosProp.SetValue(leader, campaignPos);
                                                OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 已通过 Hero.Position2D (CampaignVec2) 设置位置");
                                                positionSetSuccess = true;
                                            }
                                        }
                                        catch (Exception ex)
                                        {
                                            OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 创建 CampaignVec2 失败: {ex.Message}");
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 通过 Hero 设置位置失败: {ex.Message}");
                    }
                }

                // 如果所有方法都失败，记录详细信息并继续（使用回退方案）
                if (!positionSetSuccess)
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning("[OriginSpawnHelper] ⚠️ 所有位置设置方法都失败，将使用回退方案（EnterSettlementAction）");
                    OriginLog.Info("[OriginSpawnHelper] MobileParty 类型信息:");
                    OriginLog.Info($"  - 类型名: {partyType.FullName}");
                    OriginLog.Info($"  - 程序集: {partyType.Assembly.FullName}");
                    
                    // 记录所有字段和属性（用于调试）
                    try
                    {
                        var debugFields = partyType.GetFields(System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                        OriginLog.Info($"  - 字段总数: {debugFields.Length}");
                        foreach (var f in debugFields.Take(20)) // 只记录前20个
                        {
                            OriginLog.Info($"    * {f.Name}: {f.FieldType.Name}");
                        }
                        
                        var debugProps = partyType.GetProperties(System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                        OriginLog.Info($"  - 属性总数: {debugProps.Length}");
                        foreach (var p in debugProps.Take(20)) // 只记录前20个
                        {
                            OriginLog.Info($"    * {p.Name}: {p.PropertyType.Name} ({(p.CanWrite ? "可写" : "只读")})");
                        }
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 记录类型信息失败: {ex.Message}");
                    }
                }

                // 验证位置设置（如果成功）
                Vec2 afterPos = Vec2.Invalid;
                CampaignVec2 afterPosCampaign = CampaignVec2.Invalid;
                if (positionSetSuccess)
                {
                    try
                    {
                        // 尝试获取设置后的位置
                        var tempProp = typeof(MobileParty).GetProperty("Position2D", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                        if (tempProp != null)
                        {
                            var tempVal = tempProp.GetValue(party);
                            if (tempVal is Vec2 v) afterPos = v;
                            else if (tempVal is CampaignVec2 cv) afterPosCampaign = cv;
                        }
                        
                        // 如果属性不存在，尝试字段
                        if (afterPos == Vec2.Invalid && afterPosCampaign == CampaignVec2.Invalid)
                        {
                            foreach (var fieldName in possibleFieldNames)
                            {
                                try
                                {
                                    var field = partyType.GetField(fieldName, System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                                    if (field != null)
                                    {
                                        var tempVal = field.GetValue(party);
                                        if (tempVal is Vec2 v) { afterPos = v; break; }
                                        else if (tempVal is CampaignVec2 cv) { afterPosCampaign = cv; break; }
                                    }
                                }
                                catch { /* ignore */ }
                            }
                        }
                        
                        // 计算距离
                        float distance = float.MaxValue;
                        if (afterPos != Vec2.Invalid)
                        {
                            distance = (afterPos - targetPos).Length;
                            OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 位置设置验证: before=({beforePos.X:F2},{beforePos.Y:F2}) after=({afterPos.X:F2},{afterPos.Y:F2}) target=({targetPos.X:F2},{targetPos.Y:F2}) distance={distance:F2}");
                        }
                        else if (afterPosCampaign != CampaignVec2.Invalid)
                        {
                            var afterVec2 = new Vec2(afterPosCampaign.X, afterPosCampaign.Y);
                            distance = (afterVec2 - targetPos).Length;
                            OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 位置设置验证: before=({beforePosCampaign.X:F2},{beforePosCampaign.Y:F2}) after=({afterPosCampaign.X:F2},{afterPosCampaign.Y:F2}) target=({targetPos.X:F2},{targetPos.Y:F2}) distance={distance:F2}");
                        }
                        
                        if (distance > 1.0f)
                        {
                            OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 位置设置后距离较大 ({distance:F2})，可能设置失败或被重置");
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 位置设置验证成功，距离: {distance:F2}");
                        }
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 验证位置设置失败: {ex.Message}");
                    }
                }

                // 3) 回退方案：把玩家"进入"村子（即使位置设置失败，也要进入村子菜单）
                // 这样玩家至少会进入拉维凯尔的菜单，即使位置没有改变
                bool enterSettlementSuccess = false;
                if (enterSettlementMenu)
                {
                    try
                    {
                        // 如果当前在定居点内，先离开
                        if (party.CurrentSettlement != null)
                        {
                            LeaveSettlementAction.ApplyForParty(party);
                            OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 已离开当前定居点: {party.CurrentSettlement.StringId}");
                        }
                        
                        // 进入目标定居点（回退方案的核心）
                        EnterSettlementAction.ApplyForParty(party, target);
                        enterSettlementSuccess = true;
                        OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 已进入村子菜单: {target.StringId} (回退方案)");
                        
                        // 可选：防止 AI 在下一帧把队伍拉走
                        try
                        {
                            if (party.Ai != null)
                            {
                                var setMoveModeHoldMethod = typeof(MobileParty).GetMethod("SetMoveModeHold",
                                    System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                                if (setMoveModeHoldMethod != null)
                                {
                                    setMoveModeHoldMethod.Invoke(party, null);
                                    OriginLog.Info("[OriginSpawnHelper] 已设置 AI Hold 模式");
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    // 尝试通过 Ai 属性访问
                                    var aiProperty = typeof(MobileParty).GetProperty("Ai",
                                        System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                                    if (aiProperty != null)
                                    {
                                        var ai = aiProperty.GetValue(party);
                                        if (ai != null)
                                        {
                                            var aiSetMoveModeHoldMethod = ai.GetType().GetMethod("SetMoveModeHold",
                                                System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Public | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
                                            if (aiSetMoveModeHoldMethod != null)
                                            {
                                                aiSetMoveModeHoldMethod.Invoke(ai, null);
                                                OriginLog.Info("[OriginSpawnHelper] 已通过 Ai 设置 Hold 模式");
                                            }
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        catch (Exception ex)
                        {
                            OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 设置 AI Hold 模式失败（可选功能）: {ex.Message}");
                            // 不返回 false，因为进入定居点已经成功了
                        }
                    }
                    catch (Exception ex)
                    {
                        OriginLog.Error($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 进入村子菜单失败: {ex.Message}");
                        enterSettlementSuccess = false;
                    }
                }

                // 返回结果：如果位置设置成功或进入定居点成功，都算成功
                if (positionSetSuccess)
                {
                    OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ✅ 成功传送玩家到村子: {target.StringId} (位置已设置)");
                    return true;
                }
                else if (enterSettlementSuccess)
                {
                    OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ⚠️ 位置设置失败，但已进入村子菜单: {target.StringId} (回退方案生效)");
                    return true; // 回退方案成功，也算成功
                }
                else
                {
                    OriginLog.Error($"[OriginSpawnHelper] ❌ 位置设置和进入定居点都失败: {target.StringId}");
                    return false;
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                OriginLog.Error($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 异常: {ex.Message}");
                OriginLog.Error($"[OriginSpawnHelper] StackTrace: {ex.StackTrace}");
                return false;
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// 根据方向（direction）查找对应的村子
        /// 用于逃奴出身：根据 "desert"、"empire" 等方向查找合适的村子
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="direction">方向（"desert"、"empire"、"steppe"）</param>
        /// <returns>村子的 StringId，如果找不到则返回 null</returns>
        public static string FindVillageByDirection(string direction)
        {
            try
            {
                if (Campaign.Current == null)
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning("[OriginSpawnHelper] Campaign.Current is null");
                    return null;
                }

                string culture = null;
                if (direction == "desert")
                    culture = "aserai";
                else if (direction == "steppe")
                    culture = "khuzait";
                else if (direction == "empire")
                    culture = "empire";

                if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(culture))
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 未知方向: {direction}");
                    return null;
                }

                // 查找该文化的第一个村子
                var village = Campaign.Current.Settlements
                    .FirstOrDefault(s => s != null && s.IsVillage && s.Culture != null && s.Culture.StringId == culture);

                if (village != null)
                {
                    OriginLog.Info($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 根据方向 {direction} 找到村子: {village.StringId} ({village.Name})");
                    return village.StringId;
                }

                OriginLog.Warning($"[OriginSpawnHelper] 根据方向 {direction} 找不到村子");
                return null;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                OriginLog.Error($"[OriginSpawnHelper] FindVillageByDirection 异常: {ex.Message}");
                return null;
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// 根据文化ID查找对应的村子
        /// 用于侠义骑士出身：根据 "nord"、"aserai" 等文化查找村子
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="cultureId">文化ID（"nord"、"aserai"、"battania"、"vlandia"）</param>
        /// <returns>村子的 StringId，如果找不到则返回 null</returns>
        public static string FindVillageByCulture(string cultureId)
        {
            try
            {
                if (Campaign.Current == null)
                {
                    OriginLog.Warning("[OriginSpawnHelper] Campaign.Current is null");
                    return null;
                }

                // 特殊处理：诺德文化（sturgia）- 尝试查找拉维凯尔
